headline: Centene Corporation (CNC): David Einhorn Is Loading Up On This Stock
summary: Centene Corporation (NYSE:CNC) is featured on the David Einhorn Stock Portfolio: Top 10 Stock Picks. Centene Corporation (NYSE:CNC) first appeared in the 13F portfolio of Greenlight Capital in the first quarter of 2020. This holding comprised 204,000 shares and was sold off within the next few months. A new position was then opened in the […]
